testcase.name: testMainMethodDoesNotThrow

org.hibernate.tool.schema.spi.CommandAcceptanceException: Error executing DDL " alter table users modify column user_id bigint not null auto_increment" via JDBC [Referencing column 'user_id' and referenced column 'user_id' in foreign key constraint 'events_ibfk_1' are incompatible.] at
